sections.paragraph:
ἔλλειψις, εως, ἡ (s. prec. entry; since Democr. Fgm. 102 and Pla.; Philo; Just., A II, 1, 2) falling short of someth., failing δίχα ἐλλείψεως without failing 1 Cl 20:10.—S. DELG s.v. λείπω.

prec. prec. = preceding

Democr Democr , phil., V/IV b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

someth. someth. = something

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 318
